title: flake? ApplyLayer exit status 1 stdout:  stderr: chtimes {/dev,/tmp}: no such file or directory
body:
Two gating-test failures in the last 24 hours, two different (but related) subtests, common factor is "chtimes": [buildah-1.17.0-0.6.dev.gitbfe6da5.fc34](https://bodhi.fedoraproject.org/updates/FEDORA-2020-a79fe38418) ([log](https://jenkins-continuous-infra.apps.ci.centos.org/blue/rest/organizations/jenkins/pipelines/fedora-rawhide-build-pipeline/runs/15718/nodes/170/log/?start=0)) : ```console not ok 271 from-tagged-image ... # buildah from --quiet --pull=true --signature-policy /usr/share/buildah/test/system/policy.json docker.io/centos:7 level=error msg="Error while applying layer: ApplyLayer exit status 1 stdout: stderr: chtimes /dev: no such file or directory" Error committing the finished image: error adding layer with blob "sha256:75f829a71a1c5277a7abf55495ac8d16759691d980bf1d931795e5eb68a294c0": ApplyLayer exit status 1 stdout: stderr: chtimes /dev: no such file or directory [ rc=125 (** EXPECTED 0 **) ] ``` [buildah-1.17.0-0.7.dev.gitefc5ec2.fc34](https://bodhi.fedoraproject.org/updates/FEDORA-2020-95c6335575) ([log](https://jenkins-continuous-infra.apps.ci.centos.org/blue/rest/organizations/jenkins/pipelines/fedora-rawhide-build-pipeline/runs/15747/nodes/170/log/?start=0)) : ```console not ok 272 from the following transports: docker-archive, oci-archive, and dir ... # buildah from --quiet --pull=true --signature-policy /usr/share/buildah/test/system/policy.json docker:latest level=error msg="Error while applying layer: ApplyLayer exit status 1 stdout: stderr: chtimes /tmp: no such file or directory" The following failures happened while trying to pull image specified by "docker:latest" based on search registries in /usr/share/buildah/test/system/registries.conf: * "localhost/docker:latest": Error initializing source docker://localhost/docker:latest: error pinging docker registry localhost: Get "https://localhost/v2/": dial tcp [::1]:443: connect: connection refused * "docker.io/library/docker:latest": Error committing the finished image: error adding layer with blob "sha256:46e300cec6696ac3fff5b87cd712918b3bc7ecc63b5d5b05a786ff273bad4389": ApplyLayer exit status 1 stdout: stderr: chtimes /tmp: no such file or directory * "quay.io/docker:latest": Error initializing source docker://quay.io/docker:latest: Error reading manifest latest in quay.io/docker: error parsing HTTP 404 response body: invalid character '<' looking for beginning of value: "\n404 Not Found\n

Not Found

\n

The requested URL was not found on the server. If you entered the URL manually please check your spelling and try again.

\n" * "registry.fedoraproject.org/docker:latest": Error initializing source docker://registry.fedoraproject.org/docker:latest: Error reading manifest latest in registry.fedoraproject.org/docker: manifest unknown: manifest unknown [ rc=125 (** EXPECTED 0 **) ] ```

comments.body:
[Another one](https://jenkins-continuous-infra.apps.ci.centos.org/blue/rest/organizations/jenkins/pipelines/fedora-rawhide-build-pipeline/runs/15794/nodes/170/log/?start=0) (buildah-1.17.0-0.9.dev.git33768fc.fc34).

It's definitely a flake, because buildah-1.17.0-0.8.dev.gitaa3128e.fc34 passed.
I don't know. I'll just close and hope for the best.

It's back: https://osci-jenkins-1.ci.fedoraproject.org/job/fedora-ci/job/dist-git-pipeline/job/master/38730/testReport/(root)/tests/root_test/

[EDIT: pasting test log, because jenkins logs are short-lived]
```
not ok 213 bud arg and env var with same name
# (from function `die' in file /usr/share/buildah/test/system/helpers.bash, line 198,
#  from function `run_buildah' in file /usr/share/buildah/test/system/helpers.bash, line 185,
#  in test file /usr/share/buildah/test/system/bud.bats, line 2321)
#   `run_buildah bud --signature-policy ${TESTSDIR}/policy.json -t testctr ${TESTSDIR}/bud/dupe-arg-env-name' failed with status 125
# /usr/share/buildah/test/system /var/str
# $ /usr/bin/buildah bud --signature-policy /usr/share/buildah/test/system/policy.json -t testctr /usr/share/buildah/test/system/bud/dupe-arg-env-name
# STEP 1: FROM centos:8
# Resolved "centos" as an alias (/etc/containers/registries.conf.d/000-shortnames.conf)
# Getting image source signatures
# Copying blob sha256:7a0437f04f83f084b7ed68ad9c4a4947e12fc4e1b006b38129bac89114ec3621
# Copying config sha256:300e315adb2f96afe5f0b2780b87f28ae95231fe3bdd1e16b9ba606307728f55
# Writing manifest to image destination
# Storing signatures
# level=error msg="Error while applying layer: ApplyLayer exit status 1 stdout:  stderr: chtimes /dev: no such file or directory"
# error creating build container: Error committing the finished image: error adding layer with blob "sha256:7a0437f04f83f084b7ed68ad9c4a4947e12fc4e1b006b38129bac89114ec3621": ApplyLayer exit status 1 stdout:  stderr: chtimes /dev: no such file or directory
# [ rc=125 (** EXPECTED 0 **) ]
# #/vvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvv

A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.

Yes, [Friday](https://osci-jenkins-1.ci.fedoraproject.org/job/fedora-ci/job/dist-git-pipeline/job/master/45901/testReport/(root)/tests/root_test/):
```
not ok 239 bud --pull=false --arch test
# (from function `die' in file /usr/share/buildah/test/system/helpers.bash, line 205,
#  from function `run_buildah' in file /usr/share/buildah/test/system/helpers.bash, line 192,
#  in test file /usr/share/buildah/test/system/bud.bats, line 2779)
#   `run_buildah bud -f Containerfile --pull=false -q --arch=arm64 -t image-arm --signature-policy ${TESTSDIR}/policy.json ${mytmpdir}' failed with status 125
# /usr/share/buildah/test/system /var/str
# $ /usr/bin/buildah bud -f Containerfile --pull=false -q --arch=amd64 -t image-amd --signature-policy /usr/share/buildah/test/system/policy.json /var/tmp/tmpdab06f0417d8b209f6fbb630/my-dir
# d7cfe75eb0e4f8c404a419eeebc9d5f65bd279d5a9cdea874bf3f3e2f12e4140

# x86_64

# $ /usr/bin/buildah bud -f Containerfile --pull=false -q --arch=arm64 -t image-arm --signature-policy /usr/share/buildah/test/system/policy.json /var/tmp/tmpdab06f0417d8b209f6fbb630/my-dir
# time="2021-05-22T02:11:39Z" level=error msg="Error while applying layer: ApplyLayer exit status 1 stdout:  stderr: chtimes /opt: no such file or directory"
# error creating build container: Error committing the finished image: error adding layer with blob "sha256:093c9e1a30efaa4946c30a336fbbfcd46de5ca500c29d2a4b94d2b6daf9ef752": ApplyLayer exit status 1 stdout:  stderr: chtimes /opt: no such file or directory
# [ rc=125 (** EXPECTED 0 **) ]

This one is harder to track because it only happens in gating tests, never (so far) in CI.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
@edsantiago any recent occurrances, or has a miracle happened?

I don't see any. But: this flake has never occurred in CI, only in gating tests. There have only been a handful of buildah builds in the past month, and the flake isn't there, but I have no way of knowing if someone pressed Rerun. (Gating-test logs are completely different from Cirrus, and I have no tools to pull those logs). 

We've closed/reopened this before, I'll do so again.
